_comment: MCP server fragment merged into the project's .mcp.json by BundleInstaller. Pre-registers the board-independent Thinkube Kanban MCP server so Claude Code discovers its tools without manual config. ${serverPath} resolves to the version-stable symlinked script (globalStorage/extension-current/...), NOT the raw extension dir — see src/mcp/stableServerPath.ts. Env (THINKUBE_ROOTS, THINKUBE_ALLOW_AI_WRITES) is baked in by the installer at install time.
